Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Nov-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christie Fraser for Marvin Kasoff (Petitioner).

The Court stated that is does not see this as a way to deal with the pour over will and that the property should pass to the Trust. Ms. Fraser stated that the interest in the Trust has been distributed to the Petitioner, that the documents were signed by the Trustee, the Beneficiary and the Petitioner and that they distributed their right. Ms. Fraser also made reference to the Estate of Molino, 165 Cal.App 4th 913, Probate Code 11604, stated that this is expedient, that the same result will apply if the administer the Trust and spoke of disclaimers. The Petition for Spousal Property is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Oct-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
